kb_knowledge.author: 6816f79cc0a8016401c5a33be04be441
kb_knowledge.meta_description: Overview This article describes the standard fee schedule for financial services offered by [Company
kb_knowledge.text:
Overview

This article describes the standard fee schedule for financial services offered by [Company Name]. It explains what fees may apply, how they are calculated, and when they are billed.

Fees may vary based on:

  • Product or service selected
  • Account type
  • Transaction volume
  • Contractual agreements

Note: This article provides general guidance. Your specific fees are governed by your executed agreement and invoices.

Applicable Services

This fee schedule applies to the following service areas:

  • Account maintenance and administration
  • Transaction and payment processing
  • Advisory and professional services
  • Non‑standard or extraordinary service requests
  • Account changes and termination

Account Fees (Sample)

Account fees support ongoing account administration and standard support services.

Fee TypeDescriptionFeeBilling Frequency
Account Maintenance FeeOngoing account servicing and access$25Monthly
Inactive Account FeeAccounts with no activity for 90+ days$10Monthly
Terminated Account FeeClosed accounts retaining balances after 90 days$5Monthly

*Sample fees shown for illustration only.

Additional Notes

  • Fees may be prorated for partial months.
  • Where permitted, fees are deducted directly from the account balance.

Transaction Fees (Sample)

Transaction fees apply to financial activities processed through the platform.

Transaction TypeDescriptionSample Fee*
ACH TransferStandard ACH debit or credit$0.50 per transaction
Wire Transfer (Domestic)Outbound domestic wire$15 per wire
Card Transaction ProcessingCard‑based payment processing2.5% + $0.10
Returned / Rejected TransactionFailed or returned payment$5 per occurrence
Dispute ProcessingInvestigation and handling of disputes$25 per case

*Sample fees shown for illustration only.

Advisory & Professional Services (Sample)

These fees apply to consultative or non‑routine services requested by the customer.

Service TypeDescriptionSample Fee*
Advisory ServicesFinancial or operational consulting$250 per hour
Implementation SupportSetup and onboarding assistanceFixed fee (SOW‑based)
Custom ReportingBespoke or non‑standard reports$100 per report

*Sample fees shown for illustration only.

Important

  • Advisory services may require a signed Statement of Work (SOW).
  • Minimum service charges may apply.

Extraordinary or Non‑Standard Services

Extraordinary service fees apply when a request falls outside standard service scope.

Examples include:

  • Regulatory or audit support
  • Custom data extracts
  • Legal or compliance‑driven requests

Sample Pricing Model

  • $300 per hour
  • One‑hour minimum charge
  • Billed in arrears

Account Changes & Termination Fees (Sample)

Fee TypeDescriptionSample Fee*
Early Termination FeeTermination before contract endRemaining monthly fees
Plan Change FeeUpgrades or restructuring$50 per change
Account Reinstatement FeeReactivation of suspended accounts$25

*Sample fees shown for illustration only.

Billing & Payment

  • Fees are billed monthly, unless otherwise specified.
  • Invoices may be issued in advance or in arrears, depending on service type.
  • All fees are exclusive of applicable taxes, unless stated otherwise.
  • Payment terms are defined in your service agreement.

Fee Changes & Notifications

  • Fees may change with advance notice as required by law or contract.
  • Notifications are delivered through official communication channels.
  • Continued use of services after the effective date constitutes acceptance of updated fees.

Compliance & Regulatory Disclosure

  • All fees comply with applicable financial regulations and disclosure requirements.
  • Customers may request additional disclosures where required by law.
  • Fee disputes follow the standard dispute resolution process.

Frequently Asked Questions

Are fees refundable?
Fees are generally non‑refundable unless explicitly stated in your agreement.

Can fees be waived?
Fee waivers may apply based on contractual terms, promotions, or regulatory requirements.

Where can I see my exact fees?
Your applicable fees are listed in your service agreement, order form, or invoice.

Related Articles

  • Billing and Invoicing Overview
  • Dispute Management Process
  • Account Lifecycle Management
  • Service‑Level Agreements (SLAs)


here
